case_title: SHORVIEW APARTMENTS L.P. VS. STEVE HARRIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHORVIEW APARTMENTS L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 35 ESPANOLA LANE, #5, S.F. CA. 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF SHAWN BANKSON IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHORVIEW APARTMENTS L.P.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHORVIEW APARTMENTS L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 7/5/06, $455.00 COSTS, $224.35 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $679.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, STEVE
